releaseNotesMarkdown:
## What's new in this update

### Forge Sync improvements

_No commits since last build._

### Forge Tools improvements

- Patrol(emberveil): apply StandardComboBoxStyle to TagTypeCombo and Links ComboBox in SpatialForgeWindow
- Patrol(flameveil): guard ResetReadyPulse RepeatBehavior=Forever with ReduceMotion in SortForgeWindow
- Forgemaster: fix indentation damage in ResetButtonStyle block
- Forge(quickforge): pool pulse bar brushes — eliminates per-bar SolidColorBrush heap allocations
- Patrol(noxshade): remove dead ApplyBatch2TickEffects() method from SumForgeWindow
- Forge(questwright): created multi-phase raid boss system with 4 bosses and 4 achievements
- Patrol(grimtally): KeyForgeSettings retry helpers now catch UnauthorizedAccessException alongside IOException
- Patrol(slagfist): fix CS4014 unawaited async Dispatcher calls in KeyForge and BarForge windows
- Forge(famicom): Add Advance Wars CO Power easter egg to KeynoteDiffDialog
- Peer(trickster): unsubscribe PreviewKeyDown in KeynoteDiffDialog OnClosed
- Patrol(compassforge): BarForge profile dialogs — seed InitialDirectory from remembered path and save on success
- Forge(pixelwright): Add GridForge territory conquest mini-game to CadForge
- Populate _gfNodeMap in SpawnNodeCell so GetNodeValue returns correct node numbers
- Patrol(anvil): optimize RestoreSelection O(n²)→O(n) with HashSet in SortForgeWindow
- Peer(noxwyrm): remove dead view store in RestoreSelection
- Forgemaster(GridForge): remove unused reachedNode variable
- Restore Spatial Forge / Stub Forge / Fitting Forge icons; remove IdeaSmith from ribbon
- Elder(ashwyrm): normalize RestoreSelection indentation, no logic change
- Patrol(juicesmith): add screen shake and combo streak juice to Power Surge game
- Patrol(scribe): added XML doc to ForgeCheckResult class
- Peer(trickster): remove dead _newBestScore field, suppress CS0414 warning
- Elder(ashwyrm): add XML doc to ForgeDownloadResult class
- Arcadesmith: add Void Drifter mini-game to ViewportPositionQuickSelectWindow
- Peer(anvilwyrm): fix SpawnVdLetter — VdLetter never added to _vdLetters list
- Patrol(moltenbeard): create CLOUD_BAPTISM milestone for first cloud model export
- Peer(trickster): wire OnCloudExportMilestone event — Moltenbeard's cloud export chain was missing its ceremony hook
- Forge(whispercharm): add LastFilterText memory to SortForge
- Peer(prismsight): add AutomationProperties.Name to SortForge clear filter button for WCAG 2.1 AA
- Preload WCF facade for ADC v2027+ to fix Revit 2026 cloud sync
- Xcel Forge Updates

_(+ 25 internal/noise commit(s) hidden)_

### Plugin improvements

_No commits since last build._
